item.title: [信号 7.0] Memory has grown to nearly two-thirds of AI chip component costs
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 7.0

An Epoch AI analysis argues that memory has risen to nearly two-thirds of AI chip component costs, making DRAM supply and pricing a primary bottleneck for AI hardware cost trajectories.

Tags: #AI-hardware, #DRAM-memory, #semiconductors, #cost-analysis, #GPU-accelerators

Read original

item.title: [信号 7.0] APKPure 上的 Telegram 官方版被植入间谍后门
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 7.0

据称从 APKPure 下载的 Telegram 12.6.5 被重签名并注入 DataCollector 间谍后门，可窃取聊天记录等敏感数据并加密回传至指定 C2 服务器。

Tags: #mobile-security, #android-malware, #supply-chain, #telegram, #threat-intelligence

Read original

item.title: [信号 7.0] Google Docs 推出 Docs Live 功能：支持语音对话生成文档
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 7.0

Google 正测试 Docs Live，让用户用语音对话在 Google Docs 中生成并迭代文档草稿，同时可引用 Drive 与网页信息补全内容并遵循 Workspace 隐私规则。

Tags: #Google Docs, #Gemini, #AI写作, #语音交互, #生产力工具

Read original

item.title: [信号 6.0] Scammers are abusing an internal Microsoft account to send spam links
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 6.0

Reports indicate scammers are leveraging an internal Microsoft account to distribute spam links, highlighting broader concerns about Microsoft identity, domain trust, and phishing resilience.

Tags: #cybersecurity, #phishing, #email-security, #microsoft, #identity-and-access-management

Read original

item.title: [信号 6.0] Why is Vivado 2026.1 dropping Linux support for free tier?
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 6.0

Developers are criticizing AMD/Xilinx for allegedly removing Linux support from Vivado 2026.1’s free Basic tier, arguing it increases friction for education, hobbyist, and professional FPGA workflows compared to other vendors.

Tags: #FPGA, #EDA-tools, #Linux, #AMD-Xilinx, #Developer-Experience

Read original

item.title: [信号 6.0] 美国白宫要求在所有政府手机上安装官方应用
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 6.0

白宫要求联邦机构在所有员工政府手机和平板强制安装“白宫”应用，引发对数据泄露/后门风险及政治宣传倾向的安全与治理争议。

Tags: #Government IT, #Mobile Device Management, #Cybersecurity, #Privacy, #Public Policy

Read original

item.title: [信号 5.0] Constraint Decay: The Fragility of LLM Agents in Back End Code Generation
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 5.0

The paper reports that LLM-based coding agents degrade significantly when required to follow explicit architectural constraints, making them more reliable for prototyping than for production backend code generation.

Tags: #LLM agents, #code generation, #software architecture, #AI reliability, #backend engineering

Read original

item.title: [信号 4.0] Microsoft open-sources “the earliest DOS source code discovered to date”
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 4.0

Microsoft has open-sourced what it says is the earliest discovered DOS source code, reconstructed from paper printouts, providing new primary material on early PC operating system development.

Tags: #open-source, #software-history, #operating-systems, #reverse-engineering, #programming-languages

Read original
